description: CONCAT function never returns null, coerces null arguments to empty string

columns.name: display
columns.note: CONCAT never returns null, even with null args it coerces to empty string

name: string_concat_function
query_sql:
-- @name ConcatDisplay
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, CONCAT(name, ' <', email, '>') AS display FROM users
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT);
